name: Checkbox
description: A form control for selecting one or more options. Supports checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states.

slots.label: Label text displayed next to the checkbox.
slots.description: Description text displayed below the label.
slots.error: Error message displayed below the checkbox.

aria.aria-checked: Reflects the checked or indeterminate state.
aria.aria-invalid: Set when error state is active.
